correctSentence: We should try cooking together as a hobby on weekends.

correctSentence: The gardener could not dig the soil because it was too hard.

correctSentence: I should write in my journal every day to improve my hobby.

correctSentence: As a photographer, I may develop my skills by practicing different techniques every day.

correctSentence: The musician could not perform at the concert because he injured his hand.
